videos.headline: Auburn crushes Mississippi State
videos.description: Jarrett Stidham passes for 264 yards and two touchdowns as Kerryon Johnson runs for three scores as No. 13 Auburn tops No. 24 Mississippi State 49-10.

videos.headline: Auburn's Johnson runs for 59 yards
videos.description: Kerryon Johnson splits the middle and runs 59 yards on Auburn's first drive.

videos.headline: Stidham flea-flicker goes 49 yards for Auburn
videos.description: Auburn sets up in the wildcat and hands off to QB Jarrett Stidham who finds Darius Slayton for 49 yards.

videos.headline: Davis dives for the Auburn TD
videos.description: Ryan Davis dives for the pylon on a seven-yard touchdown pass from Jarrett Stidham.

videos.headline: Mixon bobbles catch but holds on for big gain
videos.description: Keith Mixon juggles the ball for a bit but holds on for a 45-yard reception from Nick Fitzgerald.

videos.headline: Fitzgerald buys time for Miss State TD
videos.description: Nick Fitzgerald bought enough time on third-and-goal for Justin Johnson to get open across the end zone for Mississippi State's first touchdown.

videos.headline: Stidham delivers huge pass from his own end zone
videos.description: Jarrett Stidham connects with Eli Stove for 57 yards from inside his own end zone for Auburn.

videos.headline: Fitzgerald finds Couch from his end zone
videos.description: Nick Fitzgerald gets his team out of their end zone with a 32-yard pass to Jamal Couch.

videos.headline: Fitzgerald throws pick-six to Auburn
videos.description: Nick Fitzgerald's pass was tipped and picked for a 37-yard return and score by Javaris Davis.

videos.headline: Couch gets his toe down for a big gain
videos.description: Jamal Couch manages to keep a foot in bounds on a 28-yard pass from Nick Fitzgerald to get Mississippi State in the red zone.

videos.headline: Willis takes it 67 yards for another Auburn TD
videos.description: Malik Willis comes off the bench and runs 67 yards for the Tiger touchdown.

videos.headline: Johnson takes it in for Auburn's first TD
videos.description: Kerryon Johnson caps off an all-rushing drive with a one-yard touchdown for Auburn.

videos.headline: Stove takes it 30 yards to the red zone for Auburn
videos.description: Eli Stove takes it 30 yards on a sweep into Mississippi State's red zone.

videos.headline: Johnson scores his 2nd rushing TD for Auburn
videos.description: Kerryon Johsnon takes it up the middle for his second rushing touchdown of the game for Auburn.

videos.headline: Stidham find Davis for 52 yards
videos.description: Kyle Davis beats his man up the sideline for a 52-yard reception from Jarrett Stidham into the red zone for Auburn.

videos.headline: Johnson leaps over pile for his 3rd TD
videos.description: Kerryon Johnson scores a one-yard touchdown in style with a leap over the defense to pad Auburn's lead.

videos.headline: Malzahn: 'Need to get better on third down'
videos.description: Auburn Head Coach Gus Malzahn liked what he saw from his offense in the first half, but wants them to clean up their play on third down.

videos.headline: Stidham: 'We're getting more comfortable'
videos.description: Auburn quarterback Jarrett Stidham thinks his team is gelling at just the right time after their win against Mississippi State.
